rejection_reason: tone: forbidden_phrase_start — email opens with 'I hope this email finds you well'. This phrase signals low-effort templating and is the single most common reason cold emails are ignored. Open with a specific signal instead.
text:
Subject: Saving time at {{company}}, {{first_name}}

Hi {{first_name}},

I hope this email finds you well! I wanted to reach out to tell you about FlowAI, a productivity platform that saves professionals an average of 2 hours per day.

We integrate with 50+ popular tools and are used by 10,000+ professionals.

Would you be open to a quick 15-minute call to learn more?
